en.mapTargetDefinition: An action that is or was performed on or for a patient. This can be a physical intervention like an operation, or less invasive like long term services, counseling, or hypnotherapy.

/description[at0001]/items[at0049.1].mapTargetDefinition: A human-readable narrative that contains a summary of the resource and can be used to represent the content of the resource to a human. The narrative need not encode all the structured data, but is required to contain sufficient detail to make it "clinically safe" for a human to just read the narrative. Resource definitions may define what content should be represented in the narrative to ensure clinical safety.

/description[at0001]/items[at0067.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code that classifies the procedure for searching, sorting and display purposes (e.g. "Surgical Procedure").
/description[at0001]/items[at0067.1].mapTargetBindings: For example codes, see ProcedureCategoryCodes(SNOMEDCT) (example to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-category|4.0.1) A code that classifies a procedure for searching, sorting and display purposes.

/description[at0001]/items[at0002].mapTargetDefinition: Identification of the procedure or recording of "absence of relevant procedures" or of "procedures unknown".
/description[at0001]/items[at0002].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHOULD be taken from Procedures - IPS (preferred to http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/ValueSet/procedures-uv-ips)

/description[at0001]/items[at0060.1].mapTargetDefinition: Estimated or actual date, date-time, period, or age when the procedure was performed. Allows a period to support complex procedures that span more than one date, and also allows for the length of the procedure to be captured.

/description[at0001]/items[at0070].mapTargetDefinition: The coded reason why the procedure was performed. This may be a coded entity of some type, or may simply be present as text.
/description[at0001]/items[at0070].mapTargetBindings: For example codes, see ProcedureReasonCodes (example to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-reason|4.0.1) A code that identifies the reason a procedure is required.

/description[at0001]/items[at0063].mapTargetDefinition: Anatomical location which is the focus of the problem.
/description[at0001]/items[at0063].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHOULD be taken from SNOMEDCTBodyStructures (preferred to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site)

/description[at0001]/items[at0048.1].mapTargetDefinition: For example codes, see ProcedureOutcomeCodes(SNOMEDCT) (example to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-outcome|4.0.1) An outcome of a procedure - whether it was resolved or otherwise.

/description[at0001]/items[at0006.1].mapTargetDefinition: Any complications that occurred during the procedure, or in the immediate post-performance period. These are generally tracked separately from the notes, which will typically describe the procedure itself rather than any 'post procedure' issues.
/description[at0001]/items[at0006.1].mapTargetBindings: For example codes, see Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes (example to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code|4.0.1) Codes describing complications that resulted from a procedure.

/description[at0001]/items[at0014.1].mapTargetDefinition: Captures the reason for the current state of the procedure.
/description[at0001]/items[at0014.1].mapTargetBindings: For example codes, see ProcedureNotPerformedReason(SNOMED-CT) (example to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-not-performed-reason|4.0.1) A code that identifies the reason a procedure was not performed.

/description[at0001]/items[at0005.1].mapTargetDefinition: Any other notes and comments about the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0004.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0004.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0038.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0038.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0039.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0039.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0068.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0068.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0041.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0041.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/ism_transition[at0043.1].mapTargetDefinition: A code specifying the state of the procedure. Generally, this will be the in-progress or completed state.
/ism_transition[at0043.1].mapTargetBindings: The codes SHALL be taken from EventStatus (required to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status|4.0.1) A code specifying the state of the procedure.

/description[at0001]/items[at0073].mapTargetDefinition: Estimated or actual date, date-time, period, or age when the procedure was performed. Allows a period to support complex procedures that span more than one date, and also allows for the length of the procedure to be captured.

at0039.1.description: O procedimento planejado foi cancelado antes do início.

at0068.1.description: O procedimento, ou procedimento secundário, no caso de procedimentos sequenciados, foi iniciado.

at0043.1.description: O procedimento foi realizado e todas as atividades clínicas associadas concluídas.

at0039.1.description: *The planned procedure has been cancelled prior to commencement.(en)

at0068.1.description: *The procedure, or subprocedure in a multicomponent procedure, has been commenced.(en)

at0043.1.description: *The procedure has been performed and all associated clinical activities completed.(en)

at0039.1.description: *The planned procedure has been cancelled prior to commencement.(en)

at0068.1.description: *The procedure, or subprocedure in a multicomponent procedure, has been commenced.(en)

at0043.1.description: *The procedure has been performed and all associated clinical activities completed.(en)

at0039.1.description: *The planned procedure has been cancelled prior to commencement.(en)

at0068.1.description: *The procedure, or subprocedure in a multicomponent procedure, has been commenced.(en)

at0043.1.description: *The procedure has been performed and all associated clinical activities completed.(en)

at0039.1.description: Den planlagte prosedyren har blitt avlyst før den ble igangsatt.

at0068.1.description: Prosedyren eller en del av en prosedyre som består av flere delprosedyrer er påbegynt.

at0043.1.description: Prosedyren er utført og alle tilknyttede kliniske handlinger er fullførte.

at0004.1.description: Die Prozedur, die durchgeführt werden soll, ist geplant.

at0039.1.description: Die geplante Prozedur wurde vor Beginn storniert.

at0068.1.description: Die Prozedur, oder eine Subprozedur in einem mehrstufigen Vorgehen, wurde begonnen.

at0043.1.description: Die Prozedur wurde durchgeführt und alle damit verbundenen klinischen Aktivitäten wurden beendet.

en.mapTargetDefinition: A device that is implanted, removed or otherwise manipulated (calibration, battery replacement, fitting a prosthesis, attaching a wound-vac, etc.) as a focal portion of the Procedure.

/items[at0001].mapTargetDefinition: The device that was manipulated (changed) during the procedure.

at0000.1.description: An instrument, apparatus, implant, material or similar, used in the provision of healthcare. In this context, a medical device includes a broad range of devices which act through a variety of physical, mechanical, thermal or similar means but specifically excludes devices which act through medicinal means such as pharmacological, metabolic or immunological methods.  The scope is inclusive of disposable devices as well as durable or persisting devices that require tracking, maintenance activities or regular calibration, recognising that each type of device has specific data recording requirements.

author.name: Anneka Sargeant
author.organisation: Institut für Medizinische Informatik - Universitätsmedizin Göttingen

author.name: Alan March

en.mapTargetDefinition: Identifies medications, devices and any other substance used as part of the procedure.

/items[at0003.1].mapTargetDefinition: Identifies coded items that were used as part of the procedure.

at0000.1.description: *An instrument, apparatus, implant, material or similar, used in the provision of healthcare. In this context, a medical device includes a broad range of devices which act through a variety of physical, mechanical, thermal or similar means but specifically excludes devices which act through medicinal means such as pharmacological, metabolic or immunological methods.  The scope is inclusive of disposable devices as well as durable or persisting devices that require tracking, maintenance activities or regular calibration, recognising that each type of device has specific data recording requirements.(en)

An instrument, apparatus, implant, material or similar, used in the provision of healthcare. In this context, a medical device includes a broad range of devices which act through a variety of physical, mechanical, thermal or similar means but specifically excludes devices which act through medicinal means such as pharmacological, metabolic or immunological methods.  The scope is inclusive of disposable devices as well as durable or persisting devices that require tracking, maintenance activities or regular calibration, recognising that each type of device has specific data recording requirements.

*An instrument, apparatus, implant, material or similar, used in the provision of healthcare. In this context, a medical device includes a broad range of devices which act through a variety of physical, mechanical, thermal or similar means but specifically excludes devices which act through medicinal means such as pharmacological, metabolic or immunological methods.  The scope is inclusive of disposable devices as well as durable or persisting devices that require tracking, maintenance activities or regular calibration, recognising that each type of device has specific data recording requirements.(en)

Um instrumento, aparelho, implante, material ou similares para a prestação de cuidados de saúde . Neste contexto, um dispositivo médico inclui uma ampla variedade de dispositivos que atuem através de uma variedade de meios físicos, mecânicos , térmicos ou semelhantes, mas exclui especificamente os dispositivos que atuem através de meios farmacológicos tais como medicamentos, metabólicos ou métodos imunológicos. O escopo é inclusive de dispositivos descartáveis​​, bem como dispositivos duráveis ​​ou permanentes que requerem seguimento, atividades de manutenção ou calibração regular, reconhecendo que cada tipo de dispositivo tem requisitos de registro de dados específicos.

Et instrument, apparat, implantat, materiale, programvare eller lignende som er benyttet i utførelsen av helsetjenester. I denne konteksten er medisinsk utstyr et bredt spekter utstyr med fysiske, mekaniske, termiske, programvaremessige eller tilsvarende virkemåter. Utstyr som har en farmakologisk, metabolsk eller immunologisk virkning ekskluderes spesifikt. 

Arketypen tar høyde for registrering av engangsutstyr samt varig utstyr som krever sporing, vedlikehold eller jevnlig kalibrering, og tar høyde for at hvert enkelt medisinsk utstyr har spesifikke behov for dataregistrering.

Ein Instrument, ein Gerät, ein Implantat, ein Material oder ähnliches, das für die Bereitstellung von Gesundheitsleistungen verwendet wird. In diesem Zusammenhang umfasst ein medizinisches Gerät eine breite Palette von Geräten, die auf verschiedene physikalische, mechanische, thermische oder ähnliche Weise wirken, schließt jedoch insbesondere Geräte aus, die auf medizinischem Wege wirken, wie zum Beispiel pharmakologische, metabolische oder immunologische Methoden. Der Geltungsbereich umfasst
Einweggeräte sowie langlebige oder dauerhafte Geräte, die nachverfolgt,
gewartet oder regelmäßig kalibriert werden müssen, wobei zu berücksichtigen ist, dass für jeden Gerätetyp bestimmte Datenaufzeichnungsanforderungen gelten.

Ett instrument, en apparat, ett implantat, ett material eller liknande, som används vid tillhandahållande av hälso- och sjukvård. 
En medicinteknisk produkt i detta sammanhang inkluderar produkter som verkar ex. genom en mängd olika fysiska, mekaniska eller termiska sätt. I sammanhanget exkluderas specifikt produkter som verkar med medicinska medel såsom farmakologiska, metaboliska eller immunologiska metoder.
Arketypen tar höjd för engångsprodukter och produkter med tillfällig-, kort- och långvarig användning som kräver spårning, underhållsaktiviteter eller regelbunden kalibrering. Arketypen tar också höjd för att varje typ av medicinteknisk produkt har sina egna specifika krav på registrering av uppgifter.

Een instrument, apparaat, implantaat, materiaal of dergelijke dat wordt gebruikt bij het verlenen van gezondheidszorg. In deze context omvat een medisch hulpmiddel een breed scala aan hulpmiddelen die op verschillende fysische, mechanische, thermische of soortgelijke manieren werken, maar sluit specifiek hulpmiddelen uit die op medicinale wijze werken, zoals farmacologische, metabolische of immunologische methoden. De reikwijdte omvat zowel wegwerpapparaten als duurzame of blijvende hulpmiddelen waarvoor tracking, onderhoudsactiviteiten of regelmatige kalibratie nodig zijn, waarbij wordt erkend dat elk type apparaat specifieke vereisten voor gegevensregistratie heeft.

Un instrument, un appareil, un implant, un matériau ou similaire, utilisé dans la prestation de soins de santé. Dans ce contexte, un dispositif médical comprend un large éventail de dispositifs qui agissent par divers moyens physiques, mécaniques, thermiques ou similaires, mais exclut spécifiquement les dispositifs qui agissent par des moyens médicinaux tels que les méthodes pharmacologiques, métaboliques ou immunologiques. Le champ d'application comprend les dispositifs jetables ainsi que les dispositifs durables ou persistants qui nécessitent un suivi, des activités de maintenance ou un étalonnage régulier, en reconnaissant que chaque type de dispositif a des exigences spécifiques en matière d'enregistrement des données.

Un instrument, aparell, implant, material o semblant, utilitzat a l’hora de proporcionar atenció sanitària. Prenent en compte això, un producte sanitari inclou una àmplia gamma de productes, els quals funcionen mitjançant una varietat de mitjans físics, mecànics, tèrmics o semblants, però que exclou específicament productes que funcionen mitjançant mitjans medicinals, com ara mètodes farmacològics, metabòlics o immunològics. L’abast inclou tant els productes rebutjables com els productes duradors o persistents que exigeixen rastreig, activitats de manteniment o calibració regular, prenent en compte que cada producte té requisits específics de registre de dades.

Un instrumento, aparato, implante, material o similar, usado a la hora de proporcionar atención sanitaria. En este contexto, un producto sanitario incluye una amplia gama de productos, los cuales funcionan mediante una variedad de medios físicos, mecánicos, térmicos o similares, pero que excluye específicamente productos que funcionan mediante medios medicinales, como ahora métodos farmacológicos, metabólicos o inmunológicos. El alcance incluye tanto los productos desechables como los productos durables o persistentes que requieren traqueo, actividades de mantenimiento o calibración regular, teniendo en cuenta cada tipo de producto tiene requisitos específicos de registro de datos.

author.organisation: Institut für Medizinische Informatik - Universitätsmedizin Göttingen
